schedules.title: Dry Storage Temp & Humidity Check
tasks: Record temperature (must be 50–70°F)
Record humidity (must be <60%)
Check for condensation or moisture
Log any out-of-range readings and notify supervisor

schedules.title: Cold Storage Temperature Check
tasks: Record temperature (must be 33–41°F)
Check door seals for damage
Verify alarm system is functional
Log any out-of-range readings and take corrective action

schedules.title: Freezer Temperature Check
tasks: Record temperature (must be 0°F or below)
Check for ice buildup on coils
Verify door seals are intact
Log any out-of-range readings and take corrective action

schedules.title: Production Floor Temp & Humidity Check
tasks: Record temperature
Record humidity
Note any HVAC issues
Log any out-of-range readings

schedules.title: Staging Area Temp & Humidity Check
tasks: Record temperature
Record humidity
Check for condensation or moisture

schedules.title: Production Floor Light & Glass Inspection
tasks: Inspect all light fixtures for damage or missing covers
Check for cracked or broken bulbs/tubes
Verify shatter-proof covers are intact
Inspect glass windows, gauges, and panels for cracks
Document any findings and replace damaged items immediately

schedules.title: Packaging Area Light & Glass Inspection
tasks: Inspect all light fixtures for damage or missing covers
Check for cracked or broken bulbs/tubes
Verify shatter-proof covers are intact
Inspect clear panels and viewing windows for cracks
Document any findings and replace damaged items immediately

schedules.title: Warehouse Light & Glass Inspection
tasks: Inspect all overhead light fixtures
Check for cracked or broken bulbs/tubes
Verify high-bay fixture covers are intact
Check loading dock door windows for damage
Document any findings

schedules.title: Zone A Pre-Op Cleaning Verification
tasks: Verify all food contact surfaces are clean and sanitized
Check floors for debris and standing water
Inspect walls and ceilings for contamination
Verify cleaning chemicals are at proper concentration
Check waste receptacles are empty and lined
Confirm sanitizer contact time was met

schedules.title: Zone B Pre-Op Cleaning Verification
tasks: Verify all food contact surfaces are clean and sanitized
Check floors for debris and standing water
Inspect walls and ceilings for contamination
Verify cleaning chemicals are at proper concentration
Check waste receptacles are empty and lined
Confirm sanitizer contact time was met

schedules.title: Packaging Area Cleaning Verification
tasks: Verify packaging surfaces are free of debris
Check scales and labelers are clean
Inspect conveyor belts for residue
Verify waste has been removed
Check sanitizer stations are stocked

schedules.title: Restroom & Break Room Sanitation Check
tasks: Verify restrooms are clean and stocked
Check hand wash stations have soap, towels, and sanitizer
Inspect break room for cleanliness
Verify GMP signage is posted and visible

schedules.title: Loading Dock Cleaning Inspection
tasks: Inspect dock area for debris and contamination
Check pest control devices around dock doors
Verify dock plates and bumpers are clean
Check receiving area is organized and clean
Inspect waste/recycling area

schedules.title: Zone A Deep Clean
tasks: Deep clean all equipment surfaces
Scrub floors with approved cleaner
Clean ceiling vents and light covers
Sanitize drain covers
Detail-clean hard-to-reach areas
ATP swab verification on 3+ surfaces

schedules.title: Zone B Deep Clean
tasks: Deep clean all equipment surfaces
Scrub floors with approved cleaner
Clean ceiling vents and light covers
Sanitize drain covers
Detail-clean hard-to-reach areas
ATP swab verification on 3+ surfaces
